ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the film */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the film (e.g., Released, Post-Production) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating of the film */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of user votes for the film */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the film */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the film */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the production company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the production company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the production company is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_3166_1" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_production_companies" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the production company in the film (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_countries" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the country in the film (e.g., filming location, production country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the genre in the film (e.g., primary genre, secondary genre) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., production notes, marketing materials) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploader" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the campaign is for */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign (e.g., age group, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a film */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version (e.g., changes made, bug fixes) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the version (e.g., DVD, Blu-ray) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_versions_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequels" (
  "sequel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequel relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "sequel_film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequel film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the sequel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequels_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequels_sequel_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequel_film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_franchises_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
